description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from dark-stained wooden slats, fastened together with visible metallic rivets at regular intervals. The box features open slats on all four sides and the bottom, allowing for ventilation and visibility of contents. Two thick, rope-like handles are attached to the shorter sides, providing a sturdy grip for lifting and carrying. The wood grain is prominent, giving the box a rustic, weathered appearance suitable for urban or industrial settings. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, making it ideal for storing or transporting various items. There are no visible lids, locks, or labeling areas, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A rustic, open wooden storage box with rope handles and visible metal rivets, designed for easy carrying and ventilation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slatted design and absence of handles on this side.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a prominent rope handle attached to the center of the box.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with open slats and no handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a matching rope handle, identical to view 1.
